generationMode: built-in image_gen, one independent generation per scene
commonPrompt: Portrait semi-realistic painterly industrial sci-fi battle backdrop for a 2D turn-based mobile game. Horizon about 30% down; continuous unobstructed walkable ground from 32% to 82% in centered one-point perspective; calm evenly lit standing lanes centered at 24% and 76% width; subtle central floor divider; top 7% empty sky or haze; bottom 18% plain darker floor; environmental detail confined above the horizon; overall mid-to-dark and desaturated. No characters, robots, creatures, people, animals, text, numbers, logos, watermarks, UI, frames, borders, vignettes, or foreground objects.

outputs.title: Scrapyard Verge
outputs.scenePrompt: Open compacted scrap-metal yard; crushed-machinery towers and a dead crane on the skyline; overcast dusk, rust and ochre.

outputs.title: Rusted Gantry
outputs.scenePrompt: Wide rust-streaked steel gantry deck; collapsed lattice catwalks above the horizon; sodium-orange light and deep distant shadows.

outputs.title: Coolant Run
outputs.scenePrompt: Dry poured-concrete floor; enormous coolant pipes crossing the sky behind; pale cyan mist and cold blue-grey.

outputs.title: Fabrication Floor
outputs.scenePrompt: Polished factory floor with restrained lane markings; idle assembly arms and conveyors along the back wall; sterile white-green worklight.

outputs.title: The Stack
outputs.scenePrompt: Flat top of a vast stacked structure; lower tiers falling away beyond the horizon; high-altitude haze and cool grey-violet.

outputs.title: Signal Yard
outputs.scenePrompt: Packed gravel and subtle flush cable trenches; antenna masts and dishes on the skyline; overcast muted green-grey.

outputs.title: Broken Relay
outputs.scenePrompt: Cracked ceramic platform; toppled relay tower and torn cabling behind; distant blue arcs and storm light.

outputs.title: Cold Storage
outputs.scenePrompt: Frosted metal decking with edge ice; frozen-container racks receding into fog; near-monochrome pale blue.

outputs.title: Deep Fabrication
outputs.scenePrompt: Oil-stained subterranean machine-hall floor; vast dormant machinery behind; amber emergency light and heavy dark.

outputs.title: The Foreman
outputs.scenePrompt: Raised continuous inspection platform; dead screen bank and throne-like control rig behind; hard red key light.

outputs.title: The Overcircuit
outputs.scenePrompt: Dark continuous floor with faint circuit tracery; colossal branching circuit structure above the horizon; electric violet on near-black.

outputs.title: Molten Yard
outputs.scenePrompt: Dark basalt casting floor with orange cooling channels at the outer edges; foundry ladles, furnace mouths, rim light and smoke behind.

outputs.title: Signal Apex
outputs.scenePrompt: Windswept transmission-spire platform; cloud deck beyond the horizon and dish arrays behind; cold dawn and thin pale gold.

outputs.title: The Reclamation
outputs.scenePrompt: Cracked concrete pad with dead grey vegetation restricted to edges; half-buried machinery and collapsed dome behind; ashen desaturated green.

outputs.title: The Core Foreman
outputs.scenePrompt: Black mirrored floor with subtle concentric inlaid rings; immense ribbed cathedral-like dormant core chamber behind; deep cyan on black with a single hard key.
